change.purpose: Compose deployment acceptance with trusted-builder, DSSE/transparency, signing-time, and signer-identity decisions while requiring every decision to bind the exact same deployment-proof SHA-256.

verification.route: isolated Node test runtime using byte-equivalent committed logic
cases: all predicates and acceptance bind exact proof bytes
changed proof bytes reject against earlier acceptance digest
unrecognized external parameters reject trusted-builder decision

limits: The adapter performs no cryptography and depends on upstream verifier outputs.
The deployment workflow has not yet been updated to invoke this adapter.
Cloudflare deployment remains blocked on valid environment credentials.
Promotion does not establish scientific, medical, diagnosis, or treatment truth.
privacy_boundary: Contains repository paths, test outcomes, and abstract trust predicates only; no secrets, private chat, health records, diagnosis, or treatment claims.
